title: Portfolio & Blog
description: Personal portfolio website built with Astro, Tailwind CSS v4, and Notion as CMS. Features Neo-Brutalism design, smooth Framer Motion animations, and high Lighthouse scores.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce application with Next.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. Includes cart, checkout flow, Stripe integration, and admin dashboard.

title: Real-time Chat App
description: WebSocket-based chat application supporting multiple rooms, user authentication, and message history with infinite scroll.
